name: NexCampus v2.4.4
changelog: Desktop entry now always updated, icon recopied on every launch
Window icon set via GTK set_default_icon_from_file
Stale system-level desktop entries cleaned up
update-desktop-database called after entry creation for app drawer
Binary auto-copied to ~/.nexcampus/ for seamless self-update
All Code Lab functions working (unclosed quote fix)
